title: Sand Sloth

The '''''Sand Sloth''''' was a [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]] [[Starrunner-class starship|''Starrunner''-class starship]] which served as the personal [[Starship/Legends|ship]] of [[Kea Moll]] during the early years of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. The ship formerly belonged to her father and the young Kea often worked on it alongside him. When he was killed in a failed mission against the Empire for the [[Annoo resistance]], the ship became Kea's.

Kea used the ship to travel to [[Ingo/Legends|Ingo]] on a mission to destroy the [[Fromm Gang/Legends|Fromm Gang's]] weapons satellite, ''[[Trigon One]]''. Her mission was a success, thanks to the assistance of the young [[Landspeeder/Legends|speeder]] racers [[Thall Joben/Legends|Thall Joben]] and [[Jord Dusat]].

Kea gave her new friends a lift to the [[Boonta Speeder Race]], but ''Sand Sloth'' came under attack from the vengeful Fromms, damaging the engines and forcing her to crash-land in a scrap yard on [[Boonta/Legends|Boonta]]. The ship was repaired with the assistance of [[Proto One]].

==Behind the scenes==
The ship was not explicitly named in [[Star Wars: Droids: The Adventures of R2-D2 and C-3PO|''Star Wars Droids'']], only referred to by Kea as "my star runner", and in the script as "Kea's 'star runner.'" It was also identified as the ''Star Runner'' in the [[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe, Second Edition, Revised and Expanded|second edition]] of ''[[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe]]'', though later, in ''[[Polyhedron 170]]'', the name of the ship was changed to ''Sand Sloth'' with "Starrunner" becoming the name of the class.
